title: Dhammika Perera sworn in as MP
body_lines: Business tycoon Dhammika Perera was sworn as an MP before Speaker Mahinda Yapa Abeywardana a short while ago.
He was sworn in as a national list MP in place of former Minister of Finance Basil Rajapaksa, who resigned from Parliament recently. (Ajith Siriwardana and Yohan Perera)
